So, Tyler, just for context, like, we've done plenty of programmatic-based things in our time here, but, like, essentially what that means is, like, template-based content that we are scaling out, and usually you're going after some sort of, like, like, you know, repeatable set of variants.
Yeah.
Like it could be, you know, going after different industry pages and then going after all the industries and like some sort of qualifier of like, what is that content?

Who owns that?

A lot of our process that we have here that's more dialed in, even though we see a lot of opportunities still to improve it, is more like editorial, longer form content.
And so a lot of what we've built, we've kind of almost like square pig round hold the whole like, how do we do programmatic for this account?
